gaps: No existing test case covers the Voice Prompts & Tones settings synchronization between mobile and PC.
No test case addresses bitmask handling for voice prompt/tone options.
No test case covers synchronization of Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, or Answer/Ignore settings across platforms.
All existing test cases focus on onboarding, EULA, splash screen, and location permissions — none relate to Device Settings or cross-platform sync.

generated_testcases.title: Verify Voice Prompts & Tones settings sync from mobile to PC with correct bitmask
steps: 1. Launch the mobile app and navigate to Device Settings.
2. Open 'Voice Prompts & Tones' section.
3. Enable 'Voice Prompts' toggle.
4. Set 'Tone' option to a specific value (e.g., Tone 1).
5. Enable 'Calls' -> 'Hold Reminder' toggle.
6. Enable 'Calls' -> 'Incoming Call' toggle.
7. Set 'Active Audio Tone' to a specific option (e.g., Continuous).
8. Enable 'Answering Call' toggle.
9. Enable 'Answer/Ignore' toggle.
10. Sync the device settings to the paired PC.
11. On the PC app, navigate to Device Settings -> Voice Prompts & Tones.
12. Verify that 'Voice Prompts' is enabled.
13. Verify that 'Tone' matches the value set on mobile.
14. Verify that 'Hold Reminder' is enabled.
15. Verify that 'Incoming Call' is enabled.
16. Verify that 'Active Audio Tone' matches the value set on mobile.
17. Verify that 'Answering Call' is enabled.
18. Verify that 'Answer/Ignore' is enabled.
generated_testcases.expected: All Voice Prompts & Tones settings (Voice Prompts, Tone, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) are correctly synchronized from mobile to PC, indicating proper bitmask handling.

generated_testcases.title: Verify Voice Prompts & Tones settings sync from PC to mobile with correct bitmask
steps: 1. Launch the PC app and navigate to Device Settings.
2. Open 'Voice Prompts & Tones' section.
3. Enable 'Voice Prompts' toggle.
4. Set 'Tone' option to a specific value (e.g., Tone 2).
5. Enable 'Calls' -> 'Hold Reminder' toggle.
6. Disable 'Calls' -> 'Incoming Call' toggle.
7. Set 'Active Audio Tone' to a different option (e.g., Once).
8. Disable 'Answering Call' toggle.
9. Enable 'Answer/Ignore' toggle.
10. Sync the device settings to the paired mobile device.
11. On the mobile app, navigate to Device Settings -> Voice Prompts & Tones.
12. Verify that 'Voice Prompts' is enabled.
13. Verify that 'Tone' matches the value set on PC.
14. Verify that 'Hold Reminder' is enabled.
15. Verify that 'Incoming Call' is disabled.
16. Verify that 'Active Audio Tone' matches the value set on PC.
17. Verify that 'Answering Call' is disabled.
18. Verify that 'Answer/Ignore' is enabled.
generated_testcases.expected: All Voice Prompts & Tones settings are correctly synchronized from PC to mobile, confirming bidirectional sync with correct bitmask handling.

generated_testcases.title: Verify partial bitmask update does not corrupt other Voice Prompts & Tones settings during sync
steps: 1. On mobile, configure Voice Prompts & Tones with a known baseline: Voice Prompts=ON, Tone=Tone1, Hold Reminder=ON, Incoming Call=ON, Active Audio Tone=Continuous, Answering Call=ON, Answer/Ignore=ON.
2. Sync to PC and confirm all settings match.
3. On PC, change ONLY the 'Tone' option to Tone3 (leave all other settings unchanged).
4. Sync from PC back to mobile.
5. On mobile, verify that 'Tone' is now Tone3.
6. Verify that all other settings (Voice Prompts, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) remain unchanged from the baseline.
generated_testcases.expected: Changing a single setting (Tone) on PC and syncing back to mobile updates only that setting without corrupting or resetting any other Voice Prompts & Tones settings, confirming correct bitmask partial update handling.

generated_testcases.title: Verify bitmask integrity when all Voice Prompts & Tones options are disabled on mobile and synced to PC
steps: 1. On mobile, navigate to Device Settings -> Voice Prompts & Tones.
2. Disable 'Voice Prompts' toggle.
3. Disable 'Calls' -> 'Hold Reminder' toggle.
4. Disable 'Calls' -> 'Incoming Call' toggle.
5. Disable 'Answering Call' toggle.
6. Disable 'Answer/Ignore' toggle.
7. Set 'Active Audio Tone' to 'None' (if available) or the lowest value.
8. Sync the settings to the paired PC.
9. On PC, navigate to Device Settings -> Voice Prompts & Tones.
10. Verify that 'Voice Prompts' is disabled.
11. Verify that 'Hold Reminder' is disabled.
12. Verify that 'Incoming Call' is disabled.
13. Verify that 'Answering Call' is disabled.
14. Verify that 'Answer/Ignore' is disabled.
15. Verify that 'Active Audio Tone' reflects the expected disabled/lowest state.
generated_testcases.expected: All Voice Prompts & Tones settings are correctly synchronized as disabled from mobile to PC, confirming bitmask correctly represents the all-disabled state.

generated_testcases.title: Verify bitmask integrity when all Voice Prompts & Tones options are enabled on PC and synced to mobile
steps: 1. On PC, navigate to Device Settings -> Voice Prompts & Tones.
2. Enable 'Voice Prompts' toggle.
3. Set 'Tone' to the highest available value.
4. Enable 'Calls' -> 'Hold Reminder' toggle.
5. Enable 'Calls' -> 'Incoming Call' toggle.
6. Set 'Active Audio Tone' to the highest available value.
7. Enable 'Answering Call' toggle.
8. Enable 'Answer/Ignore' toggle.
9. Sync the settings to the paired mobile device.
10. On mobile, navigate to Device Settings -> Voice Prompts & Tones.
11. Verify that 'Voice Prompts' is enabled.
12. Verify that 'Tone' matches the highest value set on PC.
13. Verify that 'Hold Reminder' is enabled.
14. Verify that 'Incoming Call' is enabled.
15. Verify that 'Active Audio Tone' matches the highest value set on PC.
16. Verify that 'Answering Call' is enabled.
17. Verify that 'Answer/Ignore' is enabled.
generated_testcases.expected: All Voice Prompts & Tones settings are correctly synchronized as enabled with maximum values from PC to mobile, confirming bitmask correctly represents the all-enabled state.

generated_testcases.title: Verify rapid successive changes to Voice Prompts & Tones do not cause bitmask corruption during sync
steps: 1. On mobile, rapidly toggle the following settings in quick succession (within 2 seconds):
a. Voice Prompts: ON -> OFF -> ON
b. Tone: Tone1 -> Tone2 -> Tone3
c. Hold Reminder: ON -> OFF -> ON
d. Incoming Call: OFF -> ON -> OFF
e. Active Audio Tone: Continuous -> Once -> Continuous
f. Answering Call: ON -> OFF -> ON
g. Answer/Ignore: OFF -> ON -> OFF
2. Immediately trigger a sync to PC.
3. On PC, verify the final state of each setting matches the last action performed on mobile.
4. On PC, change a single setting (e.g., set Tone to Tone1) and sync back to mobile.
5. On mobile, verify that only Tone changed to Tone1 and all other settings remain as they were after step 1.
generated_testcases.expected: Rapid successive changes do not corrupt the bitmask; the final state is correctly synced, and subsequent partial updates work correctly without data loss or corruption.

generated_testcases.title: Verify Voice Prompts & Tones settings survive app restart and re-sync with correct bitmask
steps: 1. On mobile, configure Voice Prompts & Tones with a mixed state: Voice Prompts=ON, Tone=Tone2, Hold Reminder=OFF, Incoming Call=ON, Active Audio Tone=Once, Answering Call=OFF, Answer/Ignore=ON.
2. Sync to PC and verify all settings match.
3. Close the mobile app completely.
4. Re-launch the mobile app.
5. Navigate to Device Settings -> Voice Prompts & Tones.
6. Verify all settings still reflect the configured state from step 1.
7. Trigger a re-sync to PC.
8. On PC, verify all settings still match the configured state.
generated_testcases.expected: Voice Prompts & Tones settings persist across app restart and re-sync without bitmask corruption or data loss.
